service.description: Implements the run#DeviceRequestInternal interface for GenICam vision cameras using moqui-jep.

if.message: A connection instance is required for GenICam to communicate with the camera. Request name: ${request?.requestName}
Connection transportConfig must specify the absolute path to the .cti GenTL driver.
Connection transportConfig must specify driver path.
This service must be called in a web request context.
Connection transportConfig must specify driver path.

log.message: Cleaning up GenICam ToF tensors older than ${thresholdDate} (daysToKeep=${daysToKeep})...
Successfully cleaned up ${deletedCount} old ToF tensors.
